data.title: Super Micro Computer, Intel, Alibaba And CVS Are Among Top 13 Large-Cap Gainers Last Week (Feb 10-Feb 14): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?

data.title: Mary Trump Warns DNI Gabbard Could Lead To 'Catastrophic Outcome': 'A Known Russian Asset,' Defender of 'Murderous Dictator' Assad
data.description: Tulsi Gabbard, President Donald Trump's contentious selection, has been confirmed as the new Director of National Intelligence (DNI).
